title: [ImportVerilog] Fix edge case for single-bit pre- and post-increment

features.name: pre-increment on single-bit signed integer
features.description: Code should include a pre-increment operation (++x) applied to a single-bit signed integer variable where the type is signed with width 1

features.name: post-increment on single-bit signed integer
features.description: Code should include a post-increment operation (x++) applied to a single-bit signed integer variable where the type is signed with width 1
